description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print, ribbing around inner neck and nike swoosh on left sleeveFittingStandardWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron on the print Do not dry clean Gravity must be the last thing in your mind when you're out to conquer the world in style. Stay true to life with this blue pure cotton tee from nike. Pair it with light blue denims and funky Nike sneakers from the wide collection on myntra to don a carefully cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
